sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15306" key="a)/rneios1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄρνειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀρήν</etym>) <sense id="n15306.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a lamb</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sheep,</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
